description:
A single-edged sword forged by a master craftsman.
"Range 1"
name: Kotetsu

description:
A ninja sword which hides the user from enemies.
"Range 1""Evasion +10%"
name: Hagakure

description:
A ninja sword with a flaming blade pattern.
"Range 1""Critical Rate +10%"
name: Ninja Sword "Homura"

description:
A samurai sword named "golden-web spider".
"Range 1""Add \I[2] +20%"
name: Jorogumo

description:
A short katana with a three-legged crow pattern.
"Range 1""Move+1"
name: Yatagarasu

description:
A divine sword with a will that grows with its owner.
"Range 1""more Lv, more damage""Learn: Pandemonium"
name: Hyakkimaru

description:
A weapon suitable for grapplers.
"Range 1"
name: Holy Copper Gauntlet

description:
A big gauntlet which prefers defense to counterattack.
"Range 1""Counterattack change: Guard"
name: Gauntlet of Protection

description:
A gauntlet which reflects magics from the opponents.
"Range 1""Counterattack change: Reflect Magic"
name: Mirror Gauntlet

description:
The user will return healing to a friend on support.
"Range 1""Counterattack change: Bless"
name: Gauntlet of Bless

description:
A gauntlet which can fly against enemies by a miracle.
"Range 5(linear)"
name: Rocket Punch

description:
A spear with a long range.
"Range 2"
name: Long Spear

description:
A heavy lance which is designed to be used on horseback.
"Range 3（linear）"
name: Charging Lance

description:
A long spear to attack the center of the enemy line.
"Range 4（oblique）"
name: Cross Pike

description:
A spear to be thrown. Suitable for rear-guards.
"Range 2-3"
name: Javelin

description:
A silver spear which onverts the user's life into power.
"Range 2""Light""more HP, more damage"
name: Holy Spear "Angela"

description:
A black spear which converts the user's crisis into power.
"Range 2""Darkness""less HP, more damage"
name: Dark Spear "Diablo"

description:
The spear wielded by the royal guard.
"Range 2"
name: Guardian Spear

description:
A handy small bow which assassins prefer to use.
"Range 2-4"
name: Smart Bow

description:
A small hunting bow. Its power increases with movement.
"Range 1-3""more move distance, more damage"
name: Hunting Bow

description:
A large combat bow. More powerful when stationary.
"Range 3-5""less move distance, more damage"
name: Dragon Roar

description:
A bow with split magic, which can random attack 3 enemies.
"Range 2-4""AoE 3""random attack 3 enemies"
name: Comet Star

description:
A golden bow, which will be empowered by the distance.
"Range 2-6""more distance from target, more damage"
name: Shining Bow "Valkyrie"

description:
A giant steel axe.
"Range 1"
name: Battle Axe

description:
An axe to be thrown. Can attack from a distance.
"Range 3"
name: Francisca

description:
An enchanted axe which can attack surrounding enemies.
"Range 1(all direction)"
name: Earth Breaker

description:
An excellent axe for heroes.
"Range 1""Damage increases a lot when HP is full"
name: Heroic Saga

description:
An axe for battle masters.
"Range 1""more TP, more damage"
name: Battle Master

description:
A fire grimoire, which is good for winter.
"no counterattack""learn: Elfire, Flare Rondo"
name: Red Flame Grimoire

description:
An ice grimoire, which everyone equips in summer.
"no counterattack""learn: Ice Sword, Frozen"
name: White Ice Grimoire

description:
A grimoire enchanted with lightning magic.
"no counterattack""learn: Thunderbolt, Lightning"
name: Purple Lightning Grimoire

description:

"no counterattack""learn: Life Divide, Magic Snatch"
name: Spirit Drain Grimoire

description:
A shining grimoire, which can be used as a lantern.
"no counterattack""learn: Holy Arrow, Shine"
name: Holy Light Grimoire

description:
A grimoire with forbidden dark magic.
"no counterattack""learn: Darkness, Chaos Gate"
name: Black Abyss Grimoire

description:
A dugger adventurers love. No facing confront.

name: Adventurer's Dugger

description:
A dugger used instead of shield, suitable for parring.

description:

name: Magic Dugger

description:

name: Gale Dugger

description:

"AoE 3 (surrounding)"
name: Dancer's Dugger

description:
Its trajectory can be blocked by enemies.
"learn：Ether Buster"
name: Ether Buster

description:
